code_quality.notes: 12 files >400 lines, 4 god components (>10 useState/useRef). No dead exports, no 'as any', no TODO/FIXME. All large refactors deferred.

security.notes: No XSS vectors, no eval, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML. localStorage only stores UI state.

performance.notes: Added React.memo to 4 components: GraphTemplatePanel, MapComparisonPanel, ChangeHistoryPanel, PresentationMode

tests.notes: Contract tests for useGraphInit (30 assertions, 1085-line hook) and useFullscreen (18 assertions). useLocalGraph already had 314 lines of BFS tests.

code_quality.notes: Same deferred items from Cycle 1. No new issues — codebase was already clean.

performance.notes: 4 remaining unmemoized components are small (<250 lines). No actionable perf issues.
